approved_wording: Historical Arena dataset slice, not a live leaderboard.
required_context: Use with A-0013 captions and any prose naming top rows.
forbidden_wording: live May 24 leaderboard; current leaderboard; latest model ranking
notes: Keep "historical" close to the first rank mention.

required_context: Use in full caption, source note, or figure footer.
forbidden_wording: overall best models; Arena top models with no config; May 24 top rows
notes: Do not shorten away config/split/category in final layout.

approved_wording: Adjacent rows should be read as a cluster where confidence intervals overlap.
required_context: Use near rank rows 1-4 and any sentence tempted to dramatize rank order.
forbidden_wording: clear winner; decisive lead; rank 1 beats rank 2

approved_wording: Rank numbers are row order in one published historical slice.
required_context: Use in footnote or appendix table heading.
forbidden_wording: absolute rank; model quality rank; universal rank

approved_wording: A leaderboard model name is not release-status evidence.
required_context: Use for rows with preview, beta, or model names that might imply product availability.
forbidden_wording: available model; released product; commercial access proven
notes: This caveat is mandatory for model-name-driven prose.

approved_wording: Do not connect these rank rows to provider prices without a same-scope price-quality table.
required_context: Use anywhere A-0013 appears near pricing, context-window, or provider-comparison prose.
forbidden_wording: best value; cheapest frontier model; price-performance winner

approved_wording: Overall preference rows do not prove coding, agentic workflow, reasoning, safety, latency, or enterprise quality.
required_context: Use in appendix notes and any Chapter 13 transition to task-specific benchmark discussion.
forbidden_wording: best coding model; safest model; best enterprise assistant; fastest model

approved_wording: Show the methodology figure before rank rows.
required_context: Use as layout instruction for Chapter 13.
forbidden_wording: rank chart before methodology; caveats only in endnotes

approved_wording: Arena historical slice: `text_style_control` / `latest` / `overall`, published 2026-05-19; intervals overlap, and rows are not live ranks or release-status evidence.
required_context: Use when layout allows one compact note under A-0013.
forbidden_wording: best models as of cutoff; live ranks; product availability
notes: This is the default one-line footnote.
